purpose: Session memory for invented NPCs who are not yet full character files.

policy.background_npcs: Do not save disposable background NPCs unless they become recurring or meaningful.
policy.important_npcs: Save invented NPCs with name, role, goal, conflict, witness value, rumor value, relationship effect, or future hook.
policy.promotion_rule: If an NPC becomes major enough for long-term canon, promote them later into characters/<id>/ files. Until then keep them here.
